channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [UGROCAP] Ugro Capital's 33rd AGM Scheduled for May 29, 2026
item.description:
Ugro Capital Ltd has announced its 33rd Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for Friday, May 29, 2026, at 11:00 A.M. (IST) via video conferencing. The meeting will cover the adoption of audited financial statements for the year ended March 31, 2026, the appointment of directors, and the appointment of statutory auditors. E-voting will be available for members, with the cut-off date set for May 22, 2026. The notice and annual report have been sent to members via email and are available on the company's website.

  • Ugro Capital's 33rd AGM will be held on May 29, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • The AGM includes adopting financial statements and appointing directors and auditors.
  • E-voting cut-off date is May 22, 2026, with voting starting May 26, 2026.
  • Mr. Rohit Goyal retires by rotation and offers himself for re-appointment.
  • M/s G.P. Kapadia & Co. is proposed as the Statutory Auditors of the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ugro Capital Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [BRITANNIA] Britannia Industries: Senior Management Changes Approved
item.description:
Britannia Industries Ltd. announced changes in its senior management personnel, effective April 1, 2026, and June 15, 2026. Mr. Rahul Mahajan has been elevated from National Sales Head - General Trade to Vice President – Sales. Mr. Chitwan Singh has been appointed as the Chief Business Officer - International Business. These appointments were approved by the Board of Directors on May 7, 2026, based on the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee.

  • Rahul Mahajan elevated to Vice President – Sales, effective April 1, 2026.
  • Chitwan Singh appointed as Chief Business Officer - International Business, effective June 15, 2026.
  • Appointments approved by the Board on May 7, 2026.
  • Rahul Mahajan has 22 years of FMCG experience.
  • Chitwan Singh has 25 years of global FMCG experience.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BRITANNIA INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [NRBBEARING] NRB Bearings Declares ₹2.25 Interim Dividend (112.5%)
item.description:
NRB Bearings Ltd has declared a 3rd interim dividend of ₹2.25 per equity share (112.5%) at its board meeting held on May 07, 2026. The dividend will be paid to members whose names appear on the Register of Members as on the Record Date, May 13, 2026, within 30 days of the declaration. The board also approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. There will be no recommendation for a final dividend for FY 2025-26.

  • NRB Bearings declares ₹2.25 per share interim dividend.
  • Dividend record date is set for May 13, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board.
  • No final dividend recommended for FY 2025-26.
  • Investment approved in Mahant Tool Room and NRB Unitech Friction Solutions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NRB BEARINGS LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [ISHWATR] Ishwarshakti: Vivek & Yashasvi Seksaria Resign as Directors
item.description:
Mr. Vivek Kailashchandra Seksaria and Mr. Yashasvi Viviek Seksaria have resigned from their positions as Directors of Ishwarshakti Holdings & Traders Ltd, effective March 31, 2026, due to personal reasons. Mr. Yashasvi Seksaria will also cease to be a member of the Audit Committee. The company acknowledged their contributions. Details and resignation letters are enclosed as annexures.

  • Vivek Seksaria and Yashasvi Seksaria resigned as Directors of Ishwarshakti Holdings.
  • Resignations are effective from March 31, 2026, due to personal circumstances.
  • Yashasvi Seksaria will also step down from the Audit Committee.
  • The company appreciates their contributions and guidance as Directors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ISHWARSHAKTI HOLDINGS & TRADERS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [NRBBEARING] NRB Bearings Approves ₹2.25 Interim Dividend for FY26
item.description:
NRB Bearings Ltd's Board of Directors has approved a 3rd interim dividend of ₹2.25 per equity share (112.5%) for the financial year 2025-26. The dividend will be paid to shareholders on the register as of the record date, May 13, 2026, within 30 days of declaration. The board also approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, and has decided against recommending a final dividend for FY26. Additionally, the company will invest in Mahant Tool Room Private Limited and NRB Unitech Friction Solutions Private Limited, acquire land for expansion up to ₹40 crores, and adopt an updated Vigil Mechanism Policy.

  • NRB Bearings declares ₹2.25 per share as 3rd interim dividend for FY26.
  • Record date for interim dividend is May 13, 2026.
  • No final dividend will be recommended for FY26.
  • Company to invest in Mahant Tool Room and NRB Unitech Friction Solutions.
  • Acquisition of land parcel up to ₹40 crores approved for expansion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NRB BEARINGS LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [ALLSEC] Alldigi Tech Approves FY26 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Alldigi Tech Ltd's Board of Directors approved the annual audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, as per Indian Accounting Standards (Ind-AS). The results, along with the unmodified Auditor’s Report, comply with Regulation 33 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The meeting was held on May 7, 2026, and the information is available on the company's website.

  • Alldigi Tech approved annual audited financial results for FY26.
  • Auditor's report has an unmodified opinion.
  • Results comply with SEBI's Listing Regulations.
  • Meeting concluded at 7:50 P.M. on May 7, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ALLSEC TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NRBBEARING] NRB Bearings: ₹2.25 Interim Dividend, Record Date May 13, 2026
item.description:
NRB Bearings Ltd has declared a 3rd interim dividend of ₹2.25 per equity share (112.5% of face value of ₹2 each) for FY 2025-26. The record date for determining entitlement to the dividend is May 13, 2026. There will be no recommendation for a final dividend for FY 2025-26. Dividend payments will be made electronically or via warrants/drafts within 30 days of declaration, subject to tax deduction at source. The trading window remains closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the announcement of financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • NRB Bearings declares ₹2.25 interim dividend per share.
  • Record date for the dividend is set for May 13, 2026.
  • No final dividend will be recommended for FY 2025-26.
  • Dividend payments will be subject to tax deduction at source.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hours post FY26 results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NRB BEARINGS LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [NRBBEARING] NRB Bearings Board Approves Investments & ₹2.25 Dividend
item.description:
The Board of Directors of NRB Bearings Ltd approved investments in its subsidiaries, Mahant Tool Room Private Limited and NRB Unitech Friction Solutions Private Limited. Additionally, they approved a 3rd interim dividend of ₹2.25 per equity share (112.5%) with a record date of May 13, 2026. The board also approved the acquisition of land for expansion up to ₹40 crores and adopted an updated Vigil Mechanism Policy. Audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, were also approved.

  • NRB Bearings approves investments in subsidiaries.
  • Interim dividend of ₹2.25 per share declared; record date May 13, 2026.
  • Land acquisition up to ₹40 crores approved for expansion.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved.
  • Updated Vigil Mechanism Policy adopted.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NRB BEARINGS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ALLSEC] Alldigi Tech Approves FY26 Audited Results
item.description:
Alldigi Tech Ltd's Board of Directors approved the annual audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, as per Indian Accounting Standards (Ind-AS). The approval occurred at the board meeting held on May 7, 2026. The company has also enclosed the auditor's report with an unmodified opinion and a declaration as required under Regulation 33(3)(d) of the Listing Regulations.

  • Alldigi Tech board approved FY26 audited financial results.
  • Results are prepared as per Indian Accounting Standards (Ind-AS).
  • Auditor's report with unmodified opinion enclosed.
  • Declaration under Regulation 33(3)(d) of Listing Regulations enclosed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ALLSEC TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ANZEN] Anzen India Energy Trust Approves Sponsor Change & Acquisition
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust announced that unitholders approved key resolutions via postal ballot. These include the exit of SEPL Energy Private Limited as Sponsor and induction of Epic Green Urja Private Limited (EGUPL) as the new Sponsor. Also approved was the acquisition of 100% equity share capital of Kudgi Transmission Limited and issuance of units on a preferential basis for consideration other than cash of upto ₹1100 crores. The voting results and Scrutinizer's Report dated May 7, 2026, are available on the company's website.

  • Unitholders approved the change of Sponsor from SEPL Energy to Epic Green Urja.
  • Approval granted for the acquisition of 100% equity of Kudgi Transmission Limited.
  • Issuance of units on a preferential basis for upto ₹1100 crores approved.
  • Unitholding of Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust held by Infrastructure Yield Plus II and associates approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust | Category: Business Update
